hooks.command: file_path=$(cat | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '(index\.html|chat_float\.js|server\.js|circles-config\.json|accounting\.html|tax_reporting\.html|finance_management\.html|enterprise_management\.html|paid_qa\.html)$'; then echo '检测到文件更新，自动上传到服务器...'; bash upload-to-server.sh; fi 2>/dev/null || true
